title: AI set to disrupt up to 28% of back-office and data roles in India over the next three years: Report
snippet: A new report suggests that 45% of organizations struggle with AI and digital skills shortages. It also predicts a major disruptions in various job sectors including back-office data roles and customer service jobs

title: WWDC 2026: Apple registers new ‘gen AI’ web domain as Siri gears up for its biggest upgrade in years
snippet: Apple has registered a new ‘gen AI’ sub domain which is expected to be a major hint at some of the new AI features that the company could unveil during its Worldwide Developer Conference next month.&nbsp;

title: Seven times creators lost out after depending on tech platforms and why OpenAI’s ‘Critterz’ may be the latest example
snippet: From YouTube’s Adpocalypse to Facebook’s publisher pivot and OpenAI’s Critterz controversy, creators have repeatedly faced losses after relying too heavily on tech platforms. As AI tools spread across creative industries, concerns are growing over sudden policy, pricing and product changes.

title: Before you replace your HDD with an SSD, here’s why some users still prefer hard drives
snippet: SSDs make laptops and PCs feel much faster, but HDDs still offer cheaper high-capacity storage. The right choice depends on your usage and storage needs.

title: Grand Theft Auto VI set for November 19 launch, Take-Two confirms; $8 billion in bookings eyed
snippet: Grand Theft Auto VI video game (GTA 6) will launch on 19 November 2026, announced Take-Two Interactive during its latest earnings report. The company also projected fiscal 2027 bookings of up to $8.2 billion, with analysts expecting the blockbuster game to drive massive sales and industry growth.

title: Apple adds two major health features in India: Know all about Sleep apnoea alerts and hearing tests
snippet: Apple has introduce two major health-tracking features in India, allowing Apple Watch users to receive sleep apnoea notifications and AirPods Pro users to perform at-home hearing tests.

Microsoft veteran Yusuf Mehdi to exit after 35 years
snippet: After 35 years at Microsoft, consumer chief marketing officer Yusuf Mehdi announced his departure, planning to leave in June 2027. Mehdi, a key figure in product launches from Windows 95 to Copilot Plus PCs, will focus on Windows, Microsoft 365, and the One Copilot vision during his remaining time.

title: I4C warns of phishing scam targeting iPhone users via fake Apple support messages
snippet: Beware of a cunning phishing scam targeting iPhone users who have lost their devices. Scammers, posing as Apple Support, are sending fake messages with malicious links to steal your Apple ID and OTP. This allows them to access your account and remove your device. Always verify links and use Apple's

title: SpaceX's Starship flight hits most targets in pre-IPO test
snippet: SpaceX's latest Starship test flight achieved a significant milestone, deploying mock satellites and executing a controlled splashdown. This successful uncrewed launch, the first of its V3 iteration, bolsters investor confidence ahead of the company's anticipated IPO next month.

title: Yatra Online Q4 net profit declines 46% to Rs 8.20 crore
snippet: Yatra Online's net profit saw a 46% drop to Rs 8.20 crore in the March 2026 quarter, impacted by the West Asia conflict which disrupted international travel demand. Despite this, the company reported strong full-year performance with revenue less service cost growth of 24.5% and adjusted Ebitda grow

title: Bihar to roll out AI policy soon: CM Samrat Choudhary
snippet: Bihar is set to become a major AI hub. The government will soon launch an AI policy to transform governance and development. AI will enhance transparency in welfare schemes and speed up complaint resolution. The state aims for technological advancement and economic prosperity.

title: Novo Nordisk uses AI to fast-track drug launches, expand India role
snippet: Novo Nordisk is leveraging Artificial Intelligence to significantly speed up new drug launches. The company expects to cut down the time to market by as much as two-thirds. Its center in Bengaluru, India, is becoming crucial for global drug preparations.

title: Nvidia says its forecast for $200 billion CPU market includes China
snippet: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang believes China remains a crucial market for central processing units.  He forecasts a 200 billion dollar market for these chips, including China. title: Law firm Fenwick agrees to pay $54 million in settlement over FTX work
snippet: US law firm Fenwick & West will pay fifty-four million dollars to settle claims from FTX customers. The firm advised FTX before its collapse.
